text: Standing here, I feel a sense of curiosity mingled with anticipation. The futuristic design and blue lighting invite contemplation on the evolving relationship between humans and technology. The "R+D" space, with its emphasis on research and development, makes me reflect on the continuous process of learning and innovation. It is as if the environment encourages me to question boundaries, embrace the unknown, and consider not only how I interact with intelligent machines, but also how those interactions shape me in return.
